state_open: Show product OPEN with interior visible and accessible. Keep all walls and parts, just show one or two doors open to show interior, do not add any extra parts
state_closed: Show product CLOSED with only exterior visible.
base_prompt_room: Professional lifestyle photograph. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - exact same shape, size, construction. Show in natural room setting with pulled-back perspective. Few appropriate items nearby. Bright studio lighting, clean throughout.
base_prompt_tight: Professional lifestyle photograph with tight framing. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - exact same shape, size, construction. Frame product edge-to-edge showing complete item. Minimal setting visible. Bright studio lighting, clean throughout.
base_prompt_cropped: Professional lifestyle photograph, close-up detail shot. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image. Zoom to show texture, materials, craftsmanship details. Bright natural lighting, high quality.
base_prompt_white: Professional studio photograph on pure white seamless background. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - exact same structure. Bright studio lighting with soft shadows. Pure white background, nothing else in frame.
base_prompt_white-in-use: Professional studio lifestyle photograph on pure white seamless background. PRODUCT MUST BE IDENTICAL to input image - exact same structure. Show product with appropriate items placed naturally on or in product. Pure white background. Bright studio lighting.

Shower Benches.prompt: Spa shower with wet tile surfaces. Product with wet appearance. Few bath items nearby. No steam, no running water.

Shower Organizers and Caddies.prompt: Shower area with wet tile. Few toiletries in organizer. No steam, no running water.

Floating Wall Shelves.prompt: Wall-mounted in bathroom, bedroom, or hallway. Few small decor items on shelves. Clean modern setting.

Storage Bins and Trays.prompt: Bathroom or bedroom. Organized items inside. Clean surfaces, bright lighting.

Storage.prompt: Bathroom, bedroom, or spa. Organized essentials visible. Clean modern aesthetic.

Floor Mats.prompt: Bathroom floor near shower or tub. Wet surface around mat. Slippers nearby/on matt. Nearby subtle footprints acceptable. Clean tile, bright lighting.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Bathroom, bedroom, or laundry room. Positioned against wall. Modern setting, bright lighting.

Towel Racks.prompt: Bathroom wall. Towels hanging on rack, same color tone throughout. Tile or painted wall background. Bright lighting.

Side Tables.prompt: Bathroom near tub or bedroom. Small items on table surface. Natural bright light.

Entryway Benches.prompt: Entryway, mudroom, or bedroom. Coat hooks or decor in background. Natural bright light. Cozy textile on bench.

Key Holders.prompt: Near front door or bathroom wall. Keys or towels hanging to match room setting with at least one hook empty. Modern interior, bright lighting.

Coffee Tables.prompt: Living room. Book or coffee cup on table. Sofa partially visible. Natural window light, contemporary interior.

Shelving.prompt: Living room, bedroom, or office wall. Few decor items on shelves. Modern design, bright lighting.

Storage.prompt: Living space, bedroom, or office. Home goods organized and visible. Modern clean aesthetic.

Tissue Boxes and Hangers.prompt: Living room side table for tissue boxes. Wall or closet for hangers with appropriate items. Bright ambient lighting.

Waste Baskets and Hampers.prompt: Living room, bedroom, spa, or bathroom. Positioned against wall. Modern flooring, bright lighting.

Bar and Counter Stools.prompt: Kitchen island or breakfast bar. Close focus on one stool with others visible in background. Pendant lighting, contemporary kitchen.

Countertop Accessories.prompt: Kitchen countertop. Fresh ingredient or cooking element nearby. Clean bright lighting, organized aesthetic.

Dining.prompt: Dining room with natural bright light. Simple place setting visible. Warm inviting atmosphere.

Floor Mats.prompt: Kitchen floor near sink or stove. Modern appliances in background. Natural bright kitchen feel.

Benches.prompt: Garden patio or deck with greenery. Natural wood or stone surface. Warm bright sunlight, outdoor setting.

Daybeds.prompt: Outdoor patio or poolside. Plush cushions on daybed. Garden plants in background, bright afternoon sunlight.

Dining Tables and Chairs.prompt: Outdoor patio or deck dining area. Simple place setting on table. Surrounding greenery, bright natural daytime lighting.

Games.prompt: Single game setup on lawn or patio. Backyard with outdoor area in background. Bright natural daylight.

Garden.prompt: Garden setting with flowering plants and greenery. Stone pathway or natural elements nearby. Bright outdoor ambiance.

Lighting.prompt: Outdoor garden or patio at dusk. Warm glowing light from fixture. Surrounding greenery, evening ambiance.

Lounge Chairs, Stools and Ottomans.prompt: Outdoor patio, deck, or poolside. Outdoor cushion on seating. Garden or pool setting in background. Bright natural outdoor lighting.

Parasols.prompt: Parasol open on patio or deck. Outdoor furniture beneath or nearby. Blue sky above, lush greenery, bright sunny day.

Sofas and Loveseats.prompt: Covered patio or outdoor living area. Cushions on seating. Garden views in background, bright ambient lighting.

Storage Chests.prompt: Outdoor deck or patio near seating area. Natural wood surface, garden greenery in background. Bright outdoor lighting.
